name: Spicy Broccoli with Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Spaghetti, linguine or dried noodles
1 bunch Green onions, trimmed and sliced
1 head of Broccoli, stems removed and cut into 1-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add noodles and cook for 8 minutes, or until just tender.
2. Trim and slice the green onions. Mince the ginger and garlic. Remove the stems from the broccoli and cut into small florets. Peel the broccoli stems and cut into strips about 1/4 inch by 3 inches.
3. Heat a wok or wide skillet over high heat and add the sausage. Cook, breaking up the sausage and stirring until browned. Pour off all but about 1 tablespoon of fat.
4. Add half the green onions, all the ginger, and garlic. Cook for 1 minute.
5. Add soy sauce, broccoli florets, broccoli stems, and hot red pepper flakes. Stir over high heat for about 3 minutes; the broccoli should be bright green and still crisp.
6. Add the drained cooked noodles and toss to combine. Serve hot, sprinkled with remaining green onions. Serves 3 to 4.
I would assume that you could use zucchini when in season or try different types of sausage.
